## Description
A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Run `...`
2. ...
3. See error

## Expected behaviour
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour
What actually happened. Include any error output or stack trace inside a code block.

```
<paste error here>
```

## Environment
- OS: <e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14.4, Ubuntu 22.04>
- Python version: <e.g. 3.12.1>
- `claude-cfg` version: <e.g. 0.1.0>
- Backend: <local | r2 | s3 | gist | sftp>

## Additional context
Anything else that might help — sample config (with credentials redacted), recent changes, etc.
